mapper.sql: id, ask_access_terminal, ask_content, ask_content_tags, ask_content_vector, ask_msg_id, ask_obj_id, ask_obj_type, ask_time, com_acct_id, create_time, feedback_content, feedback_label, feedback_score, feedback_time, feedback_type, first_text_duration, input_token_count, output_token_count, output_token_per_second, project_id, rel_id, request_status, res_access_terminal, res_content, res_content_tags, res_content_vector, res_msg_id, res_obj_id, res_obj_type, res_time, session_id, task_due_time, task_id, doc_ask_access_terminal, doc_ask_content, doc_ask_msg_id, doc_ask_obj_id, doc_ask_obj_type, doc_ask_time, doc_com_acct_id, doc_create_time, doc_feedback_type, doc_first_text_duration, doc_input_token_count, doc_output_token_count, doc_output_token_per_second, doc_project_id, doc_request_status, doc_res_access_terminal, doc_res_content, doc_res_msg_id, doc_res_obj_id, doc_res_obj_type, doc_res_time, doc_session_id, doc_task_due_time, doc_task_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM byai_message_relobj WHERE rel_id = #{relId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO byai_message_relobj ( rel_id, com_acct_id, ask_time, ask_obj_id, ask_access_terminal, task_due_time, ask_msg_id, ask_obj_type, res_obj_type, res_time, res_content, res_obj_id, create_time, res_msg_id, res_access_terminal, project_id, task_id, request_status, ask_content, ask_content_tags, res_content_tags, ask_content_vector, res_content_vector, input_token_count, output_token_count, output_token_per_second, first_text_duration, feedback_type, feedback_time, feedback_label, feedback_score, feedback_content, session_id ) VALUES ( #{item.relId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.comAcctId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.askTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.askObjId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.askAccessTerminal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskDueTime}, #{item.askMsgId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.askObjType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resObjType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resObjId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.resMsgId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.resAccessTerminal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.requestStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.askContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.askContentTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resContentTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.askContentVector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resContentVector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.inputTokenCount}, #{item.outputTokenCount}, #{item.outputTokenPerSecond}, #{item.firstTextDuration}, #{item.feedbackType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.feedbackTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.feedbackLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.feedbackScore}, #{item.feedbackContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sessionId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

INSERT INTO byai_message_relobj ( rel_id, com_acct_id, ask_time, ask_obj_id, ask_access_terminal, task_due_time, ask_msg_id, ask_obj_type, res_obj_type, res_time, res_content, res_obj_id, create_time, res_msg_id, res_access_terminal, project_id, task_id, request_status, ask_content, ask_content_tags, res_content_tags, ask_content_vector, res_content_vector, input_token_count, output_token_count, output_token_per_second, first_text_duration, feedback_type, feedback_time, feedback_label, feedback_score, feedback_content, session_id ) VALUES
( #{item.relId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.comAcctId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.askTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.askObjId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.askAccessTerminal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskDueTime}, #{item.askMsgId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.askObjType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resObjType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resObjId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.resMsgId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.resAccessTerminal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.requestStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.askContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.askContentTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resContentTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.askContentVector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resContentVector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.inputTokenCount}, #{item.outputTokenCount}, #{item.outputTokenPerSecond}, #{item.firstTextDuration}, #{item.feedbackType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.feedbackTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.feedbackLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.feedbackScore}, #{item.feedbackContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sessionId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.update: UPDATE byai_message_relobj SET feedback_type = #{item.feedbackType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feedback_time = #{item.feedbackTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, feedback_label = #{item.feedbackLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feedback_score = #{item.feedbackScore}, feedback_content = #{item.feedbackContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE rel_id = #{item.relId}

if.test: req.isAllNotSelect == false and req.relIdList != null and req.relIdList.size() > 0
!(req.isAllNotSelect == false and req.relIdList != null and req.relIdList.size() > 0)
if.if: AND (ask_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR res_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT rel_id, task_id, project_id, com_acct_id, session_id, ask_msg_id, ask_content, ask_obj_type, ask_obj_id, ask_access_terminal, ask_time, ask_content_tags, res_msg_id, res_content, res_obj_type, res_obj_id, res_access_terminal, res_time, res_content_tags, feedback_type, feedback_score, feedback_content, feedback_time, feedback_label, request_status, task_due_time, first_text_duration, create_time FROM byai_message_relobj
ORDER BY
ask_time res_time feedback_time task_due_time feedback_score create_time
ASC DESC
